info.title: PayCan User API Documentation
info.description: User API for PayCan payment processing platform. Access products, manage orders, subscriptions, and user profile. Requires JWT authentication via Sanctum.

post.description: Generate a new access token and revoke the current one
Create a new order and get payment gateway checkout URL
Create a checkout session for the portal embedded view

get.description: Returns product details, available prices with tax, selected price breakdown, and available payment methods.

parameters.name: selected_price_id
parameters.description: Selected Product Price ID for detailed breakdown

parameters.name: billing_country
parameters.description: Billing country (ISO code, e.g., US, EU)

parameters.name: billing_state
parameters.description: Billing state/province (ISO or short code, e.g., CA)

post.description: Cancel an order that hasn't been paid yet

get.description: Retrieve paginated and filterable list of current user's orders with optional related data
Retrieve a specific order by ID for the current user
Get download links for digital products in an order
Get license keys for an order
Retrieve paginated and filterable list of active products with their active prices

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Include related data (only active prices will be included)

get.description: Retrieve a specific active product by ID with its active prices

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Include related data (only active prices will be included)

404.description: Product not found or not active

get.description: Retrieve paginated and filterable list of current user's subscriptions with optional related data

post.description: Create a new subscription for a product price

product_price_id.description: Product price ID to subscribe to

get.description: Retrieve a specific subscription by ID for the current user

post.description: Cancel an active subscription at the end of the billing period

immediately.description: Cancel immediately instead of at period end

post.description: Resume a canceled subscription before the end date
Change the subscription to a different product price

422.description: Validation error or subscription cannot be changed

get.description: Retrieve paginated and filterable list of current user's transactions
Retrieve a specific transaction by ID for the current user

current_period_end.description: Current billing period end (alias, unified display)

can_resume.description: Whether the subscription can be resumed

ValidationErrorResponse.title: Validation Error Response
ValidationErrorResponse.description: Validation error response with field-specific errors

sanctum.description: USER AUTHENTICATION (Sanctum JWT) - For mobile apps & SPAs. To get a user token for testing, use the Admin API endpoint: POST /api/admin/users/sync (see Admin API documentation). Format: Bearer <user_jwt_token>

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: API endpoints for user authentication and token management

tags.name: User Checkout
tags.description: User checkout and payment initiation endpoints
